summary: Post-GHL revert verification: 26/26 backend pytest tests and all key frontend UI flows pass. Admin login‚Üíadmin.html, signup‚Üídashboard.html, DD-214 upload, admin CRUD, contact form, and GHL cleanup all verified.
passed_tests: GET /api/member/courses ‚Äî 200 with 4 courses and progress fields
UI: admin login at /login.html redirects to /admin.html; nav shows 'ADMIN' button
UI: Admin portal renders 5 stat cards (12/1/0/1/6) and 5 tabs (Overview, Members, DD-214 Review, Courses, Contacts)
UI: Signup at /signup.html redirects to /dashboard.html with profile (name, email, branch Army, status Veteran, verification Pending)
UI: Dashboard shows DD-214 upload zone + 4 courses with progress bars
UI: Logout from dashboard redirects to /index.html
UI: Contact form submits successfully, shows success toast ('we'll be in touch...'), email field cleared (form reset)
UI: /courses.html contains zero gohighlevel/clientclub/leadconnector references; Sign In buttons link to /login.html
GHL cleanup: grep across /app/*.html and /app/js/*.js returns no matches for gohighlevel|clientclub|leadconnector|ghl
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORS allow_origins=['*'] combined with allow_credentials=True is not spec-compliant and browsers will reject credentialed requests from cross-origin callers. Works here only because frontend and API share origin via ingress. Consider restricting to FRONTEND_URL.
server.py (seed_admin): writes plaintext admin password to /app/memory/test_credentials.md on every startup ‚Äî fine for preview, but DO NOT ship to production.
server.py: cookies set with secure=False. Acceptable for preview (ingress handles TLS), but production should use secure=True + samesite='none' if cross-site.
server.py: JWT_SECRET has a fallback 'default_secret_change_me' ‚Äî ensure .env provides JWT_SECRET in production.
server.py (/{page}.html catch-all): can expose arbitrary .html files in /app. Low risk but worth whitelisting.
server.py is ~930 lines in one file ‚Äî exceeds the 700-line guideline. Split into routers (auth, admin, member, cms).
test_credentials: Admin admin@silenthonor.org / SilentHonor2024! (verified). Member accounts created dynamically in tests with TEST_ui_<hex>@example.com / UiTest!2345 and TEST_member_<hex>@example.com / MemberPass!234.
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral TEST_-prefixed members, contact submissions, and a TEST_PytestCourse that is deleted at end. One UI-signup member remains per run with verification=pending; safe to purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `pytest backend/tests/test_silent_honor.py` from /app for regression. Note pydantic EmailStr rejects .test/.local TLDs ‚Äî always use example.com. Browser automation occasionally retries navigation on first load; the actual login.html selectors are data-testid='login-email', 'login-password', 'login-submit-btn'. The non-API frontend is reached at the same preview host (ingress routes /api ‚Üí 8001, everything else ‚Üí 3000 or backend static-file handler; both serve /app/*.html identically).
rca of the issue: N/A ‚Äî no bugs found. All flows listed in the review request work end-to-end after the GHL‚Üícustom-backend revert.
